channel.title: QEMU on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in QEMU on linuxrepos

item.title: Quickemu
item.description: This is a GitHub project that installs virtual machines for more than 300+ spins of Linux, Windows, and macOS!

item.title: Virtual Machine Formats
item.description: This Guide goes over transferring and what each type of virtual machine is used for.

item.title: Setting up Windows inside Linux
item.description: Running Windows inside of Linux is essential for those that are trying to convert to Linux. There will always be a transition period and need to fallback to Windows. It is also nice to have for many Windows only programs that you may need while inside Linux.
